creator: axey.endres@gmail.com
text:
Hello!
It's my first bug report, so, sorry for any errors and for my English.

Port graphics/maim hardcodes as dependency libslopy version 7.5, but x11/slop is now version 7.6, so it doesn't find the library.
I did not test changing the version number yet

Thanks,
Axey Gabriel Muller Endres
